values.description: Base URL of the SecurePoll RW API server. Change to your deployed URL for staging/production.
JWT access token. Auto-populated by POST /auth/login test script. Leave empty — it will be set automatically.
UUID of a voter. Set automatically by List Voters or Create Voter requests.
Human-readable voter token printed on voter card (e.g. RW-001-001-0042). Update with a real token from your seed data.
UUID of a polling station. Get real UUIDs from your database seeding scripts.
UUID of a district. Get real UUIDs from your database seeding scripts.
Fraud case ID. FR-SEED01 is the first seeded case. Update after running list fraud cases.
UUID of a biometric duplicate match record. Set automatically by List Duplicates request.
Anomaly signal ID. ANOM-001 is the first seeded anomaly signal.
UUID of an audit log entry. Set automatically by List Audit Entries request.
UUID of an admin user. Set automatically by List Users request.
Role identifier string. Seeded roles: super, officer, auditor, supervisor. Update as needed.
UUID of an active session. Set automatically by List My Sessions request.
UUID of a verification attempt. Set automatically by Verify Voter (1:1 Face Match) request.
UUID of the polling officer performing verification. Get from List Users after login.
Email address of the seeded super-admin account.
Password of the seeded super-admin account. Change this in production.

info.name: SecurePoll RW — Local Dev
info.description:
Environment variables for the SecurePoll RW Postman collection targeting a local development server at http://localhost:8000.

Getting started:
1. Import this environment into Postman.
2. Import SecurePoll-RW.postman_collection.json.
3. Select this environment from the environment dropdown.
4. Run POST /auth/login — the token is stored automatically.
5. All other requests will inherit the Bearer token.
